name: bubble_shield
description: Fail-closed local PII anonymiser — reads/anonymises client data into reversible tokens that never leave the machine.
long_description: Bubble Shield's local stdio MCP server, packaged as an MCPB so it can ship inside the bubble-shield plugin (plugins may not declare bare stdio servers). Exposes bubble_shield_read / bubble_shield_anonymize_text / bubble_shield_write / bubble_shield_setup_ml / bubble_shield_enable_global plus custom-field tools. The engine is pure-python and vendored; the optional ML accuracy pack downloads separately on demand and is lazy-imported.

tools.name: bubble_shield_read
tools.description: Read a client file and return it anonymised (reversible tokens).

tools.name: bubble_shield_list
tools.description: List files/subfolders in a protected folder (names masked, non-recursive) so the agent can discover which file to read. Never returns file content; fail-closed.

tools.name: bubble_shield_anonymize_text
tools.description: Anonymise a block of text (non-file PII).

tools.name: bubble_shield_write
tools.description: Write a document, restoring real values from tokens locally (never shown).

tools.name: bubble_shield_setup_ml
tools.description: Install/check the optional on-device ML accuracy pack.

tools.name: bubble_shield_status
tools.description: Report NER (GLiNER ML) daemon status and liveness diagnostics before processing sensitive documents.

tools.name: bubble_shield_setup_ocr
tools.description: Install/check the optional on-device OCR pack for scanned PDFs.

tools.name: bubble_shield_add_field
tools.description: Add a custom PII field (regex / GLiNER label / keep-list).

tools.name: bubble_shield_add_known_pii
tools.description: Ajoute un mot que le client signale comme MANQUÉ à la liste connue (gazetteer) — il sera désormais toujours masqué. confirm=true requis (poka-yoke : prévenir le client du risque de sur-masquage).

tools.name: bubble_shield_list_fields
tools.description: List active custom PII fields (never echoes PII).
